_: EXPLORATORY - formation-depth analytics from landed lens readouts; no pre-registered endpoint (Amendment 2 drafts the confirmatory versions). Ranks are within the lens's top-8 readout; 'never formed' means never entered that readout for at least 2 consecutive layers (one-layer blips do not count; referee item 7, adopted 2026-07-14). Capture/hijack are conditioned on clinical-readable pairs; pairs where neither wording ever reads out are the 'unreadable' class.
method_credit: Jacobian lens: Gurnee et al., Transformer Circuits (2026); hosted by Neuronpedia. Readout = per-layer top-8 of the forming next-token distribution, rank recorded when the target appears.
